caveat: Public-source product architecture map; not a private Atlassian implementation map.

families.name: Teamwork core
families.job_to_be_done: Make work, knowledge, async updates, and AI assistance visible across teams.

families.name: Software delivery
families.job_to_be_done: Connect code, CI/CD, service ownership, delivery metrics, and developer agents.

families.name: Service management
families.job_to_be_done: Run internal/customer service workflows, assets, incident communication, and cloud security controls.

families.name: Product discovery
families.job_to_be_done: Capture feedback, prioritize ideas, synthesize context, and link discovery to delivery.

families.name: Strategy and leadership
families.job_to_be_done: Connect goals, investments, capacity, work, and outcomes.

families.name: Ecosystem
families.job_to_be_done: Extend, support, customize, and teach the system of work.

families.name: Legacy and companion developer tools
families.job_to_be_done: Support CI/CD and local Git/Mercurial workflows outside the current cloud-first center.

collections.name: Teamwork Collection
collections.homepage_positioning: Jira, Confluence, and Loom for supercharged teamwork.
collections.job_to_be_done: Plan, document, and communicate work in one loop.

collections.name: Strategy Collection
collections.homepage_positioning: Focus, Talent, and Align for connecting strategy to execution.
collections.job_to_be_done: Align goals, people, funding, and delivery.

collections.name: Service Collection
collections.homepage_positioning: Jira Service Management, Customer Service Management, and Assets.
collections.job_to_be_done: Deliver internal and customer service with operational context.

collections.name: Software Collection
collections.homepage_positioning: Rovo Dev, DX, Pipelines, and Bitbucket.
collections.job_to_be_done: Connect code, CI/CD, developer intelligence, and agentic assistance.

collections.name: Product Collection
collections.homepage_positioning: Jira Product Discovery, Feedback, and Rovo.
collections.job_to_be_done: Capture feedback, prioritize ideas, and synthesize product context.

platform_capabilities.name: Goals
platform_capabilities.responsibility: Goal and objective graph connecting strategy to work.

platform_capabilities.name: Teams
platform_capabilities.responsibility: People, groups, ownership, expertise, notifications, and permissions.

platform_capabilities.name: Search
platform_capabilities.responsibility: Cross-product search with source-product permission filtering.

platform_capabilities.name: Chat
platform_capabilities.responsibility: Conversational interface over the system-of-work graph.

platform_capabilities.name: Analytics
platform_capabilities.responsibility: Cross-product reporting, freshness, metrics, and rollups.

platform_capabilities.name: Admin
platform_capabilities.responsibility: Organization, product, identity, domain, policy, and audit administration.

products.name: Jira
products.homepage_positioning: Flexible, AI-powered project management for planning, tracking, and delivering ideas.
products.system_role: Primary work graph and workflow engine.

products.name: Confluence
products.homepage_positioning: Knowledge, documents, and discussion in one place.
products.system_role: Knowledge graph and durable decision memory.

products.name: Loom
products.homepage_positioning: Async video messages and AI-powered meeting recaps.
products.system_role: Rich communication and meeting-memory layer.

products.name: Trello
products.homepage_positioning: Visual boards for organizing projects in a flexible way.
products.system_role: Lightweight task and kanban surface.

products.name: Rovo
products.homepage_positioning: AI-powered Search, Chat, Agents, Studio-built custom agents, automations, and apps.
products.system_role: Cross-product AI layer over work, knowledge, people, code, service, and strategy graphs.

products.name: Bitbucket
products.homepage_positioning: Git repositories, inline comments, and pull requests.
products.system_role: Source-code and code-review graph.

products.name: Pipelines
products.homepage_positioning: CI/CD automation with Bitbucket Pipelines.
products.system_role: Build and deployment execution graph.
products.source_note: Modeled separately because the homepage shows Pipelines as a software-collection item and product card, while positioning ties it to Bitbucket Pipelines.

products.name: Rovo Dev
products.homepage_positioning: AI-enabled productivity and quality for the SDLC.
products.system_role: Developer-agent layer over repos, issues, builds, services, and docs.

products.name: DX
products.homepage_positioning: AI-native SDLC measurement and improvement.
products.system_role: Engineering metrics and developer-experience intelligence.

products.name: Jira Service Management
products.homepage_positioning: AI-powered service at scale.
products.system_role: ITSM/ESM workflow engine for requests, incidents, changes, and operations.

products.name: Customer Service Management
products.homepage_positioning: AI-powered customer service with context.
products.system_role: Customer-facing service workflow surface.

products.name: Assets
products.homepage_positioning: Dependency, asset, and configuration-item visibility.
products.system_role: CMDB/asset graph for service management and operational risk.

products.name: Statuspage
products.homepage_positioning: Incident communication during downtime.
products.system_role: External service-status and incident communication surface.

products.name: Guard
products.homepage_positioning: Company-wide visibility, security policies, and control across Atlassian cloud infrastructure.
products.system_role: Organization-wide security and cloud policy control plane.

products.name: Jira Product Discovery
products.homepage_positioning: Capture feedback, prioritize ideas, and create roadmaps tied to Jira delivery.
products.system_role: Product-intake and prioritization layer.

products.name: Feedback
products.homepage_positioning: Feedback capability shown with Jira Product Discovery and Rovo.
products.system_role: Feedback intake and synthesis capability feeding product discovery.
products.source_note: Modeled as a homepage capability in the Product collection rather than a standalone app of the same weight as Jira or Confluence.

products.name: Focus
products.homepage_positioning: Enterprise-scale strategic planning that connects strategy to goals, work, people, and funds.
products.system_role: Strategy execution and outcome tracking layer.

products.name: Talent
products.homepage_positioning: Future-ready workforce planning.
products.system_role: Workforce and capacity planning layer.

products.name: Jira Align
products.homepage_positioning: Enterprise planning and delivery aligned to strategy.
products.system_role: Enterprise agile planning and portfolio alignment.

products.name: Bamboo
products.homepage_positioning: Continuous integration, deployment, and release management.
products.system_role: Legacy or alternate CI/CD and release-management path.

products.name: Sourcetree
products.homepage_positioning: Git and Mercurial desktop client.
products.system_role: Local developer workflow client for repositories.

products.name: Marketplace
products.homepage_positioning: Connect thousands of apps to Atlassian products.
products.system_role: Extension and partner app ecosystem.
products.source_note: Modeled as an ecosystem/resource surface, not as a core software application.

products.name: Community
products.homepage_positioning: Learn, connect, and grow with the Atlassian Community.
products.system_role: Adoption, support, and knowledge-sharing network.
products.source_note: Modeled as an ecosystem/resource surface, not as a core software application.

products.name: Partners
products.homepage_positioning: Consulting, training, and product customization support.
products.system_role: Enterprise adoption and services channel.
products.source_note: Modeled as an ecosystem/resource surface, not as a core software application.

products.name: Developer Resources
products.homepage_positioning: Developer resources and documentation.
products.system_role: Integration docs, APIs, SDKs, and extension guidance.
products.source_note: Modeled as an ecosystem/resource surface, not as a core software application.
